basic_details.job_title: Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Collectorate Aravalli. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Law degree with 5 years experience as Advocate/Attorney/Government Pleader in Subordinate Court/High Court or 5 years experience in legal matters in local bodies/Govt. undertaking/Board/Corporation/Limited Company. Basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi.
qualification.details: For Legal Advisor: Qualifications: Degree in Law (Special) or Law with five years' course after Higher Secondary Certificate (H.S.C.) or any of the Universities incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognized by the Government or deemed to be a University under section 3 of the University Grant Commission Act, 1956 Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi Experience: Five years experience as a practicing Advocate or Attorney or Government Pleader in the Subordinate Court of High Court; OR Five years experience as a practicing advocate or attorney or Government Pleader in the High Court; OR Five years experience of legal matters in local bodies or Government undertaking Board/Corporation or Limited Company established by law.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.arvalli.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.collectorate_aravalli: Law degree with 5 years experience as Advocate/Attorney/Government Pleader in Subordinate Court/High Court or 5 years experience in legal matters in local bodies/Govt. undertaking/Board/Corporation/Limited Company. Basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi.

content_sections.heading: Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Collectorate Aravalli Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Legal Advisor: Qualifications: Degree in Law (Special) or Law with five years' course after Higher Secondary Certificate (H.S.C.) or any of the Universities incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognized by the Government or deemed to be a University under section 3 of the University Grant Commission Act, 1956 Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 Adequate knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi Experience: Five years experience as a practicing Advocate or Attorney or Government Pleader in the Subordinate Court of High Court; OR Five years experience as a practicing advocate or attorney or Government Pleader in the High Court; OR Five years experience of legal matters in local bodies or Government undertaking Board/Corporation or Limited Company established by law.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.arvalli.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Legal Advisor post is 31 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Legal Advisor post in Collectorate Aravalli Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Legal Advisor post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for Collectorate Aravalli Legal Advisor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Legal Advisor post is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it by Registered Post A.D.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Legal Advisor position?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Legal Advisor post must not be more than 50 years of age as on the last date of application submission.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Law degree with 5 years of experience as an Advocate/Attorney/Government Pleader or in legal matters in relevant organizations. Basic computer and language knowledge are also required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 100/-, which must be paid through a Demand Draft as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Legal Advisor post includes an Interview and a Language Proficiency Test to assess the candidate's suitability.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send my offline application for Collectorate Aravalli?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to the Collectorate, District Seva Sadan, Shamalaji Road, Modasa, Dist. Aravalli - 383315, by Registered Post A.D.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Collectorate Aravalli?
faq.answer: The official website for Collectorate Aravalli is www.arvalli.nic.in, where you can find detailed information and download the application form.
